title: CityKingPvP
description: This PvP modpack is built for fast, smooth, and competitive gameplay
body:
##  Ultimate PvP Performance Modpack 

This PvP-focused modpack is specially optimized for maximum FPS, low latency, and smooth combat gameplay. It removes unnecessary visual load while enhancing PvP mechanics and HUD clarity, giving you a clean and competitive advantage without breaking server rules.


>  **Performance First ->**
Built with powerful optimization mods to reduce lag, improve chunk loading, and stabilize memory usage. Perfect for low-end to mid-range PCs.

>  **PvP Ready ->**
Includes combat enhancements, better animations, dynamic crosshair, and essential PvP utilities to improve reaction time and awareness during fights.

>  **Clean HUD & QoL ->**
Lightweight HUD mods provide useful info like saturation, effects, minimap, and inventory data without cluttering your screen.


>  **Server-Safe & Fair Play ->**
All mods are client-side and allowed on most PvP servers, making this modpack safe for competitive play.

> **Best For ->**

- BedWars / SkyWars
- KitPvP / Practice
- Competitive PvP Servers
- Low-End & Mid-End PCs

If you want smooth PvP with no lag and clean visuals — this modpack is for you.
